name: The Aggressive Simplification
effect: Remove complexity until only a slogan remains. This card is considered decisive.

clauses.name: REDUCTION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: When a nuanced process is encountered: Collapse it into a single bullet point.

clauses.name: COLLATERAL EFFECT
clauses.rule: If the bullet point is questioned: The questioner is considered resistant to change.

clauses.name: REINSTATEMENT OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: Six months after simplification: The removed complexity is quietly reinstated under a different name.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Which three teams are now doing this manually?
